features.title: Google OAuth integration (NextAuth + 后端 session 验证)
features.acceptance: Frontend：装 next-auth@5 + @auth/core；Google provider 用 GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID + _SECRET + NEXTAUTH_SECRET；redirect URI `https://trade.guangai.ai/api/auth/callback/google`。/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts mount NextAuth；/lib/auth.ts 含 signIn callback 检查 `profile.email === ALLOWED_USER_EMAIL`，非 allowlist 返回 false。middleware.ts enforce JWT cookie 于 /(protected)/ + /api/(backend-proxy)/ 路由。/login 页面只渲染 Google 登录按钮，无 register UI。Backend：装 python-jose[cryptography]；workbench_api/auth/{jwt_validator,dependency}.py；read JWT cookie + verify with NEXTAUTH_SECRET + extract email + check allowlist；require_authenticated_user() FastAPI Depends；settings allowlist 加 NEXTAUTH_SECRET + ALLOWED_USER_EMAIL。/api/health 保持无 auth（nginx upstream + uptime monitor 需要）。安全 regression 新增：production env 下 NextAuth callback URL 必须含 trade.guangai.ai 字符串。验收：(1) 匿名访问 / 跳 /login；(2) 点 Google 登录走完 OAuth flow 回到 /；(3) 非 allowlist 邮箱 → NextAuth signIn callback 拒 → error 页 'restricted to a single authorized user'；(4) authenticated /api/protected-test → 200 + email；匿名 → 401；非 allowlist 手造 JWT → 403；(5) /api/health 仍 200 无 auth；(6) B020 既有测试 + 新 auth 测试全绿；(7) safety regression assert callback URL prod env 含 trade.guangai.ai。

features.title: SQLite + Alembic 迁移 + Repository 数据层
features.acceptance: Backend workbench_api/db/：engine.py SQLAlchemy 2.x engine 工厂读 WORKBENCH_DB_URL；session.py FastAPI Depends 每请求一 session（commit on success / rollback on exception）；models/{account,backlog_entry,snapshot_meta}.py 三个 ORM 模型 mirror B012 accounts/me.json + backlog.json + snapshot 注册表；repositories/{base,account,backlog,snapshot}.py 薄包装 (get_by_id/list_all/upsert/delete)，纯 ORM 无业务逻辑。Alembic：migrations/env.py 配 engine；versions/0001_initial.py 建 3 表；scripts/migrate.sh 跑 alembic upgrade head。新增 workbench-bootstrap CLI（pyproject.toml entry point）：若仓库根有 accounts/me.json + backlog.json 则 upsert 到 DB，idempotent。验收：(1) alembic upgrade head 新库建 3 表，再跑 noop；(2) workbench-bootstrap 把 accounts/me.json + backlog.json 4 entries import 到 DB，再跑 idempotent；(3) Repository round-trip pytest 全过；(4) /api/health 加 db_connectivity:ok 字段（不通则 500）；(5) 本地 dev WORKBENCH_DB_URL=sqlite:///./workbench-dev.db 不依赖 /var/lib/workbench/；(6) safety regression：禁 psycopg2/mysqlclient/pymongo import。

features.title: Deploy artifacts: systemd units + nginx vhost + certbot 准备
features.acceptance: workbench/deploy/ 落地：(1) systemd/workbench-backend.service 跑 uvicorn 127.0.0.1:8723 as deploy:deploy + EnvironmentFile=/etc/workbench/workbench.env + CPUQuota=200% + MemoryMax=2G + OOMScoreAdjust=500 + Restart=on-failure；(2) systemd/workbench-frontend.service 跑 next .next/standalone/server.js on 127.0.0.1:3000 同样隔离 knob；(3) nginx/trade.guangai.ai.conf server block (ssl cert path placeholder + proxy_pass / → 3000 + /api/* → 8723 + 标准 proxy_set_header + gzip + client_max_body_size 10m)；(4) scripts/deploy.sh 拷贝 artifact + daemon-reload + restart 两个 service；(5) scripts/healthcheck.sh curl /api/health 10 次 2s 间隔，任一 200 with db_connectivity=ok 即过；(6) CERTBOT-SETUP.md 文档化用户一次性跑 `certbot --nginx -d trade.guangai.ai`；(7) 资源 quota 验证步骤（systemctl show CPUQuota MemoryMax OOMScoreAdjust）供 Codex F006 在 VM 跑。验收（部分 F006 在 VM 验）：nginx -t 过；systemctl status 两 service active；外网 curl /api/health 200；systemctl show 确认 quota；/ 跳 /login；htop 期间显示 workbench 受 quota 限制，邻居服务无干扰。

features.title: CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions push → SSH deploy → health check → rollback)
features.acceptance: .github/workflows/workbench-deploy.yml：workflow_run 链触发（workbench-backend + workbench-frontend pass 后跑）；env 含 FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true（framework v0.9.23 #2）。Pre-flight grep 步：grep 仓库 + 待 SCP artifact 含 'PLACEHOLDER-REPLACE-ME' 字面串 fail（防 placeholder 进 prod 兜底）。Steps：checkout → python -m build backend → npm ci + npm run build frontend (.next/standalone)→ scp artifacts 到 deploy@$DEPLOY_HOST:/srv/workbench/releases/$GITHUB_SHA/ → ssh run deploy/scripts/deploy.sh 改 symlink /srv/workbench/current → $SHA + restart → ssh run healthcheck.sh；失败则 ssh run rollback.sh (symlink 回滚 + restart) + workflow fail。Post-success：find /srv/workbench/releases -mtime +30 GC。验收：(1) push to main 触发 workflow，全绿，< 10 min；(2) 日志含 build/scp/deploy/healthcheck 各 0 exit；(3) /api/health 返回 GITHUB_SHA = main HEAD；(4) 故意破坏 /api/health → workflow 跑 deploy → healthcheck fail → rollback 跑 → symlink 回旧 SHA → workflow non-zero exit；(5) 故意 throwaway commit 加 PLACEHOLDER-REPLACE-ME 字面 → pre-flight grep fail。

features.title: Backup automation (SQLite snapshot → GCS + retention + restore)
features.acceptance: workbench/deploy/backup/：(1) workbench-backup.sh as deploy 跑：sqlite3 .backup snapshot → gzip → gcloud storage cp gs://.../daily/ → 月初也 cp /monthly/ → prune 30 daily + 12 monthly → rm /tmp/wb-* → append /var/log/workbench/backup.log；(2) workbench-backup.service systemd one-shot User=deploy；(3) workbench-backup.timer daily 03:00 + Persistent=true；(4) workbench-restore.sh 接 backup filename arg + 下载 + ungzip + 替换 workbench.db + 交互确认（--force 可跳）。**前置 manual prereq（用户做，Generator 不能跑）：** VM SA scope 扩展 — gcloud compute instances stop kolmatrix-vps → set-service-account --scopes=cloud-platform → start；预计 30-60s 跨服务下线（kolquest / staging.kolmatrix / apify-kol / pm2 aigcgateway）。Generator 在 scope 扩完后 verify：metadata server 返回 cloud-platform scope；sudo -u deploy gcloud storage cp ... 写测试过。验收：(1) 用户完 manual prereq + scope 确认；(2) systemctl start backup.service 跑通 + gs://.../daily/ 见文件 + log 见行；(3) systemctl status backup.timer enabled + active + 次触发时间；(4) retention 测试：mtime hack 塞 35 daily 文件 + 触发 timer → 30 newest 留 / 5 oldest 删；(5) restore 测试：新 backup → 破坏 live DB → workbench-restore.sh --force → DB 复原；(6) backup.log 存在 + deploy:deploy + 644 + logrotate 月转。

features.title: Observability + healthcheck enrichment + Codex L1+L2 验收 + signoff
features.acceptance: Generator 先实施观测点：/api/health 加 uptime_seconds + last_backup_age_seconds + last_backup_size_bytes + active_user_count；workbench_api/observability/logging.py JSON formatter 含 request_id (ASGI mid) + user_id (auth dep) + event；logs 到 /var/log/workbench/{app.log,access.log} + logrotate 周转；可选 SENTRY_DSN env（unset 时 no-op）。Codex L1 checklist：npm test/pytest/ruff/mypy 全清；安全 regression 仍绿；Playwright E2E smoke 走 /login → mock Google OAuth → / → 见 disclaimer。Codex L2 checklist（在真 VM 上 6 项）：浏览器从 user laptop 走完 OAuth happy path；非 allowlist 邮箱登录拒；curl /api/health 200 version=git rev-parse HEAD；SSH systemctl show 确认 quota 200%/2G/500；gs://.../daily/ 至少一个 backup 文件（systemctl start backup.service 后）；邻居 nginx/kolquest/aigcgateway 仍 active 无 workbench 相关重启。Codex 写 docs/test-reports/B021-cloud-deploy-auth-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md 用 framework/templates/signoff-report.md；更新 progress.json status→done / docs.signoff / evaluator_feedback 概要。
